title: RUSTINS Small Job Gloss Paint Black 250ml
features: Achieve Professional Results: Rustins Small Job Range offers a fast-drying formula that ensures a flawless finish, perfect for both amateur and experienced DIY enthusiasts
Long-Lasting Protection: Designed to provide durable protection for your wood surfaces, ensuring they withstand the test of time while maintaining their natural beauty
Easy Application Process: With its user-friendly application, you can effortlessly apply the wood stain, achieving uniform coverage without streaks or blotches, ADD TO BASKET now
Versatile Usage: Suitable for various wood types and projects, including furniture, cabinets, doors, and more, providing a versatile solution for all your woodworking needs
Superior Quality: Crafted with premium ingredients, Rustins Small Job Range guarantees exceptional quality and performance, delivering professional-grade results with every application
description: From the manufacturer Where would I use this? Doors Skirting boards Worktops Other small jobs Features Water based, quick drying Gloss and Satin finish For small projects For interior & exterior use Rustins GPBLW250 QD Small Job 250ml Quick Dry Small Job is designed specifically for small painting projects. A water based hardwearing paint for interior & exterior use that is touch dry in approximately 30 minutes. A 250ml will cover approximately 3.25 sq.m. Suitable for use on wood and metal. Conforms to the Toys (Safety) Regulations 1995, BS:EN71 Part 3 which makes the paint ideal to use on children's toys and furniture. For Satin 250ml; available in Buckingham Green, Black, Buttercup, Chocolate, Oxford Blue, Poppy and White. Small Job Primer & Undercoat available in Grey & White 250ml. Available in Gloss 250ml Buckingham Green, Black, Buttercup, Chocolate, Delphinium, Magnolia, Oxford Blue, Candy Pink, Poppy, White & Pearl Grey.
